title: T-064 — Formulation lifecycle Server Actions: getFormulation + saveDraft + submitForTrial + lockVersion (NPD-g)
prompt:
# T-064 — Formulation lifecycle actions

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.1 (Server Actions paragraph + RBAC)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Four Server Actions covering the formulation lifecycle: getFormulation (read + ingredients + last calc), saveDraft (debounced 800 ms persist), submitForTrial (gate on totalPct + cost + nutrition), lockVersion (immutable lock).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/get-formulation.ts: returns formulation + current version + ingredients + cached calc.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/save-draft.ts: RBAC formulation.create_draft; upserts ingredients (transactional); writes formulation_audit_log; rejects if state≠draft.
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/submit-for-trial.ts: RBAC recipe.submit_for_trial; validates totalPct ∈ [99.99, 100.01] AND every RM has cost_per_kg_eur AND no missing nutrition target; transitions state→submitted_for_trial; emits 'formulation.submitted_for_trial'.
4. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/lock-version.ts: RBAC formulation.lock; sets locked_at + locked_by_user on formulation; transitions state→locked; emits 'formulation.locked'; cascade to fa.recipe_components per §6 Chain 3.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/get-formulation.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/save-draft.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/submit-for-trial.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/lock-version.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/__tests__/lifecycle.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a draft version with totalPct=99.5, when submitForTrial is called, then it rejects with TOTAL_PCT_OUT_OF_RANGE per §17.11.1 gate condition
2. Given a locked version, when saveDraft is called, then it rejects with VERSION_LOCKED and no audit_log entry is written per §17.11.1 lock semantics
3. Given lockVersion succeeds, when the cascade runs, then fa.recipe_components is rewritten and the outbox event 'formulation.locked' is emitted exactly once per §6 Chain 3 + §17.11.1

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/lifecycle.test.ts with 4 cases (totalPct gate, lock guard, cascade write, outbox emit) before actions exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test lifecycle'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow saveDraft on non-draft state
- Do not skip cascade to fa.recipe_components
- Do not bypass RBAC checks

pipeline_inputs.description: getFormulation + saveDraft + submitForTrial + lockVersion actions with state-machine + RBAC + cascade + outbox.
pipeline_inputs.details: saveDraft is transactional + writes audit_log; submitForTrial enforces totalPct + cost + nutrition gates; lockVersion sets immutable lock and triggers Chain 3 cascade.
out_of_scope: Do not build editor UI (T-066, T-067)
